passiveAbilities.name: Windfoot
passiveAbilities.description: This character may jog over Wooded Patches.

passiveAbilities.name: Accursed
passiveAbilities.description: When an enemy targets this character with an arcane action you may reveal a Green:X from your resist hand before any cards are played. After resolving the current action, the enemy model suffers X-1 Wds where X is the value of the revealed card.

passiveAbilities.name: Splintered Branches
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Impact or Piercing Melee dmg, increase the dmg dealt by +1.

passiveAbilities.name: Vengeance
passiveAbilities.description: If a friendly character is slain or reduced to - Wds, the fist time this model uses an Arcane Ability this turn it doesn't need to spend any energy.

arcaneAbilities.name: Deadwood Curse
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target gains [Deadwood Cursed: During the Discard Step, this character and all models friendly to this character within 3" suffer 1 Wd.], until this character is slain.
Catastrophe: This character suffers 2 Wds. All other models within 3" suffer 2 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Crowd Control
signatureMove.endStepEffect: This attack deals W damage against models which are further than 1" away. If the enemy is within 1" it is moved 1" directly away from this model.
